description: Bootstrap + $HOME 级 SessionStart hooks（状态栏、MCP、插件、LSP）

hooks.command: bash -c 'D=~/.claude/hooks/scripts; python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser(\"~/.claude/plugins/known_marketplaces.json\"), encoding=\"utf-8\")); entry=d.get(\"taptap-plugins\", {}) if isinstance(d, dict) else {}; print(entry.get(\"installLocation\", \"\") if isinstance(entry, dict) else \"\")" 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r loc; do [ -n "$loc" ] || continue; s="$loc/plugins/sync/scripts"; [ -d "$s" ] || continue; mkdir -p "$D"; for f in "$s"/*.sh; do [ -e "$f" ] || continue; ln -sf "$f" "$D/$(basename "$f")"; done; break; done; exit 0'

(S=~/.claude/hooks/scripts; [ -f "$S/ensure-statusline.sh" ] && bash "$S/ensure-statusline.sh"; [ -f "$S/ensure-plugins.sh" ] && bash "$S/ensure-plugins.sh"; [ -f "$S/ensure-tool-search.sh" ] && bash "$S/ensure-tool-search.sh"; [ -f "$S/ensure-lsp-tool.sh" ] && bash "$S/ensure-lsp-tool.sh"; [ -f "$S/ensure-lsp.sh" ] && bash "$S/ensure-lsp.sh"; true) >/dev/null 2>&1 &
